Embroidered apparel. STITCH is the craft. ASH is what it costs.

The first capsule — embroidered black on black

Made to order

Black thread on black cotton. Design embroidered on chest panel; small brand mark on left sleeve.

$185

embroidered lanyard

Made to order

Black thread on black weave. Repeated brand-mark pattern along length.

embroidered sticker

Embroidered Sticker

Made to order

Black thread on black backing. Single design with embedded brand mark.

$15

Brand

We make black hoodies.

No cheap blanks, no synthetic shortcuts, and no compromises. We build them from heavy black cotton fleece, held together with double-stitched seams that survive the wash year after year. They are substantial, structured, and engineered for actual daily comfort.

Every piece is finished with premium black-on-black embroidery. Heavy black thread locked into a black ground. Two embroidered elements: the design, and the mark. Nothing extra.

Pilot waitlist

During the pilot, orders are free — you’ll receive a render of the piece. Real fulfilment lands in the next phase.

© STITCH & ASH — pilotBone · Ember · Ash
